targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status = 'pending'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status = 'late'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gold.mart_stockout_risk WHERE risk_level IN ('critical','stockout')
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status IN ('on_time_express','on_time') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status != 'pending'
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', movement_date) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Movimentacoes" FROM gold.fct_movements WHERE movement_date >= '2025-04-20' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status='on_time_express' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Express", SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status='on_time' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "No Prazo", SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status='at_risk' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Em Risco", SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status='late' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Atrasado", SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status='pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Pendente" FROM gold.mart_order_sla

SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', issued_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS "Mes", company_id AS "Empresa", COUNT(*) AS "Pedidos", ROUND(SUM(total_value)::numeric, 2) AS "Valor Total", ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status IN ('on_time_express','on_time') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "SLA %" FROM gold.mart_order_sla GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 24

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', issued_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS "Mes", ROUND(SUM(total_value)::numeric, 2) AS "Faturamento" FROM gold.fct_orders WHERE issued_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT document_type AS "Tipo", company_id AS "Empresa", COUNT(*) AS "Qtd", ROUND(AVG(total_value)::numeric, 2) AS "Valor Medio" FROM gold.fct_orders GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT operator_user AS "Operador", SUM(movement_count) AS "Movimentos", ROUND(AVG(avg_qty_per_move)::numeric,2) AS "Qtd/Mov", ROUND(AVG(complexity_index)::numeric,3) AS "Complexidade", MAX(daily_ranking) AS "Melhor Rank" FROM gold.mart_operator_productivity GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issued_at))/3600.0 <= 4 THEN '1_0-4h' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issued_at))/3600.0 <= 8 THEN '2_4-8h' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issued_at))/3600.0 <= 24 THEN '3_8-24h' ELSE '4_>24h' END AS "Faixa", COUNT(*) AS "Pedidos" FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status = 'pending' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT order_id AS "Pedido", document_number AS "Documento", company_id AS "Empresa", issued_at AS "Emissao", ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issued_at))/3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Aging (h)", ROUND(total_value::numeric, 2) AS "Valor" FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status = 'pending' ORDER BY issued_at ASC LIMIT 15

SELECT product_id AS "SKU", warehouse_id AS "Armazem", product_class AS "Classe", current_stock AS "Estoque", ROUND(avg_daily_consumption::numeric,1) AS "Consumo/Dia", ROUND(days_to_stockout::numeric,1) AS "Dias Ruptura", risk_level AS "Risco" FROM gold.mart_stockout_risk ORDER BY CASE risk_level WHEN 'stockout' THEN 0 WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END LIMIT 20
